articles.description:

articles.title: A longtime Cape Cod restaurant has closed
articles.description:
"While this chapter is coming to an end, our story certainly isn’t."

summary: A popular Cape Cod restaurant has permanently closed its doors as of March 2026.

Residents may need to seek alternative dining experiences as a result of this closure.

articles.title: Rhode Island stroke survivor relearns to speak practicing his Dunkin’ order
articles.description:
After a sudden stroke left Rich McMahon unable to speak, his wife turned a daily coffee routine into speech therapy.

The post Rhode Island stroke survivor relearns to speak practicing his Dunkin’ order appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Rich McMahon, a Rhode Island resident, suffered a stroke affecting his speech.
His wife used daily Dunkin’ orders as speech therapy to aid his recovery.
This innovative approach highlights the importance of community support for stroke survivors.

summary: Patriots signed offensive lineman Alijah Vera-Tucker, aiming to strengthen their roster.

His performance could significantly impact the Patriots' offensive line stability this season.

articles.title: NH mom running Boston Marathon for Spaulding after son’s friend injured at beach
articles.description:

The post NH mom running Boston Marathon for Spaulding after son’s friend injured at beach appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NH mom Jessica O'Brien is running the Boston Marathon to support Spaulding Rehabilitation Hospital.
She aims to raise funds for the care that helped her son's injured friend recover.
The marathon will take place on April 17, 2023, benefiting local rehabilitation services.
